title: Glowberry+
body:
## About
Glowberries are an interesting addition to Minecraft; they provide light as well as food in otherwise dark and dreary caves. Yet have you ever felt that these hanging plants and their somewhat magical appearance could be something... more?

The essence of glowberries lies in their simplicity, a fact Glowberry+ adheres to. The features it integrates are small, yet provide a touch of practicality and ease to your Minecraft adventures. Have fun using this pack ;)!

## Features
<details>
<summary>Glowberry consumption effects</summary>

- Glowing effect
- 20% night vision chance
- 10% blindness chance
- A glowing particle trail (affects all entities that have the glowing effect)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Misc</summary>

- Crouch while holding glowberries to make signs glow (see gallery for demo)
- Spectral arrows now leave a glowing trail in the air


</details>


<details>
<summary>New crafting recipes (see gallery)</summary>

- Spectral arrows
- Lantern
- Glow item frames

</details>

---

*Made using [Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/)*
